# Elenchos

> Decode public discourse: citizen voices on X versus media and government narratives. Sentiment and narrative-divergence analysis across live geopolitical, economic, and social topics.

Elenchos applies the Socratic method (elenchos) to public discourse — surfacing contradictions between official narratives and what citizens actually say, with a focus on suppressed or under-covered regions.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Live overview of citizen sentiment, narrative divergence, signals, and regions monitored.
- [Topics](/topics): All live topics — public-square sentiment scores and trends per topic.
- [About](/about): What Elenchos is, the Socratic method behind it, and the mission.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy notice and OAuth data handling (GDPR).

## Optional

- [Sponsor](/sponsor): Sponsorship program (currently paused).
